creator: lenny@wirewalk.com
text:
Edited per Deb's request.  FreeBSD Foundation doesn't endorse or provide any certification.  BSD Certification group  does that.  http://www.bsdcertification.org/

Please add the below text.  Thank you !


Wirewalk Technologies is NYC based company, providing engineering and support services based on FreeBSD.  Staff is certified by BSD Certification group.
General purpose server systems, storage and security solutions.  
Contact us - 1-516-513-5084, info@wirewalk.com, http://wirewalk.net/freebsd
